findings: Six action service functions (archive/delete/star/unstar/mark_read/mark_unread) consistently route through users().messages().modify() or .trash() with proper label manipulation.
_get_gmail_service helper resolves the right account service for a given msg_id via contact lookup.
Server endpoints follow POST /messages/gmail/{id}/{action} pattern; returns {ok: true/false}.
TUI key bindings are context-scoped to the Gmail tab (only fire when Gmail tab active).
Optimistic UI update on action then background confirmation — consistent with send flow.
